name: Beef & Vegetable Skillet Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut boneless sirloin steak into thin stir fry strips.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil and brown beef in two batches over medium-high heat. Remove beef.
3. Add carrots, then mix the vegetable soup blend with water, soy sauce, ketchup, garlic powder, and ginger. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 5 minutes or until carrots are crisp-tender.
4. Add beef, bamboo shoots, and snow peas; simmer for an additional 3 minutes or until heated through.
5. Serve the beef mixture over hot cooked rice.
